footer.development: Built with Vue.js and Tailwind CSS
footer.catch-phrase: Transforming ideas into efficient and scalable digital solutions.

hero.presentation: 👋 Hi there! Nice to meet you, I'm

paragraphs.first: I am an early-career Full-Stack Developer passionate about software development and systems architecture. I have a strong interest in building efficient, scalable, and well-structured web applications, constantly striving to improve my knowledge of software development, best practices, and emerging technologies. I am currently completing my Bachelor's degree in Information Systems at Fundação Hermínio Ometto (FHO - Uniararas), where I also achieved first place in the 18th FHO Programming Marathon (2023).
paragraphs.second: Professionally, I work as a Software Development Intern at ESL - Excelência em Sistemas Logísticos, developing features for logistics sector TMS systems using Ruby on Rails. I have practical experience in Full-Stack Web Development, with solid back-end skills in Ruby and Python, as well as front-end experience using Vue.js to build modern, responsive, and professional user interfaces.
paragraphs.third: Although my primary focus is on web technologies, I also have a strong interest in and continuously study areas such as Artificial Intelligence and Mobile Development. Outside of work, I enjoy dedicating my time to personal projects, exploring new technologies, reading horror stories, making music, and spending quality time with family and friends — experiences that help keep my creativity and curiosity constantly alive.

projects.title: Projects

first.name: Hybrid Search API
first.description: Prototype of a RESTful API for hybrid information retrieval, used in my undergraduate thesis (FHO, 2026). It leverages embedding generation processes using neural encoding models for semantic similarity, along with Elasticsearch for indexing and as a hybrid search engine (k-NN + BM25).

second.name: NLP Benchmark
second.description: Efficiency and semantic similarity tests of encoder models available on Hugging Face.

third.name: BeeWatts Calculator
third.description: A tool designed to simulate savings and estimate the investment required for installing solar energy systems based on the user's energy consumption.

fourth.name: Stock Management System
fourth.description: Full-stack application for managing products, customers, and sales, featuring an integrated RESTful API and a dynamic interface (AJAX/Fetch).

projects.all: Click here to see all of my projects!

topics.first: Development and maintenance of features for TMS systems, meeting product team requirements and ensuring timely deliveries.
topics.second: Identification, analysis, and resolution of issues, contributing to the continuous improvement and stability of corporate systems using Ruby on Rails.
topics.third: Active participation in agile teams, collaborating in ceremonies such as daily stand-ups, backlog refinements, and technical reviews.
topics.fourth: Technical support and assistance for end users, helping resolve incidents and reducing system downtime.

topics.first: Handled and resolved internal support tickets, contributing to an approximately 20% reduction in average issue resolution time and ensuring the stability of the computing environment.
topics.second: Performed preventive and corrective maintenance on computers and servers, ensuring IT infrastructure availability.
topics.third: Provided specialized technical support to internal users, solving software and connectivity issues across multiple departments.

know_more.title: Want to know more
know_more.content: Explore my academic background, technical skills, and professional experiences in greater detail.

contact.title: Let's build something together?
contact.content: I'm always open to new conversations about the tech world. If you have a project getting off the ground and are looking for a partnership, send me a message. Let's make it happen!
